gt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for this game?
kh-subtitle: Every trophy, journal entry, treasure, puzzle piece, synthesis item and gummi mission in one checklist, saved in your browser. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.

trophies.name: Ambitious Adventurer
trophies.desc: Clear the game and watch the ending sequence.

trophies.name: To Rule Them All
trophies.desc: Defeat all Organization XIII Replica Data.

trophies.name: Mushroom Master
trophies.desc: Satisfy every member of Mushroom XIII.

trophies.name: Rookie
trophies.desc: Win the Pain and Panic Cup.

trophies.name: True Hero
trophies.desc: Win the Goddess of Fate Cup.

trophies.name: Coliseum Competitor
trophies.desc: Win the Pain and Panic Paradox Cup.

trophies.name: Above Honor
trophies.desc: Complete the Land of Dragons episodes.

trophies.name: Searcher
trophies.desc: Collect all Ansem Reports in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Professor
trophies.desc: Collect all Character entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Heartless Highbrow
trophies.desc: Collect all Heartless entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Nobody Know-It-All

trophies.name: Navigator
trophies.desc: Collect all Maps in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Conqueror
trophies.desc: Collect all Mission entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Minigame Maniac
trophies.desc: Collect all Minigame entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Limit Master
trophies.desc: Collect all Limit entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Craftsman
trophies.desc: Collect all Synthesis Note entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Seeker
trophies.desc: Collect all Character Link entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Struggle Champion
trophies.desc: Win by obtaining all of the opponent's orbs.

trophies.name: Veteran Pilot
trophies.desc: Obtain an S rank on a gummi ship mission.

trophies.name: Ace Pilot
trophies.desc: Obtain an S rank on a gummi ship mission for all routes.

trophies.name: Top Gun
trophies.desc: Obtain an S rank on a gummi ship EX mission for all routes.

cups.name: Pain and Panic
cups.unlock: Complete the story of Disney Castle

cups.name: Cerberus
cups.unlock: Complete the first visit to Agrabah, Halloween Town, and the Pride Lands

cups.name: Titan
cups.unlock: Complete the second visit to Olympus Coliseum

cups.name: Goddess of Fate
cups.unlock: Complete the Pain and Panic, Cerberus, and Titan cups, and complete the story of The World That Never Was

cups.name: Paradox: Pain and Panic
cups.unlock: Complete the Pain and Panic, Cerberus, Titan, and Goddess of Fate cups

cups.name: Paradox: Cerberus
cups.unlock: Unlock the Paradox: Pain and Panic cup, and raise Valor, Wisdom, and Master Forms to level 5

cups.name: Paradox: Titan
cups.unlock: Unlock the Paradox: Cerberus cup, and raise Summons to level 5

cups.name: Paradox: Hades
cups.unlock: Complete the second visit to Space Paranoids, clear all previous cups, and raise all Drive Forms and Summons to level 7

gummim.name: Asteroid Sweep 1
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship with 50 or more speed!
gummim.reward: EX: Caterpillar/G Rank S: Patterned Skins A Rank A: Neon Orb/G Rank B: Mini-Propeller/G Rank C: Fira/G Rank D: Thundara/G Rank E: Laser Upgrade

gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship with 100 or more power!

gummim.name: Broken Highway 3
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship set with 4 or more Slash Gummies!
gummim.reward: EX: Strike/G Rank S: Gungnir/G Rank A: Neon Bar/G Rank B: Wheel/G Rank C: Solid Helm/G Rank D: Thundara/G Rank E: Excalibur/G

gummim.name: Sunlight Storm 1
gummim.ex: Fly alongside a Teeny Ship set with 4 or more Impact Gummies!
gummim.reward: EX: Figure/G Set Rank S: Neon Skins B Rank A: Sonic Turbo/G Rank B: Large Shell/G Rank C: Thundaga/G Rank D: AP Limit Upgrade Rank E: Draw

gummim.name: Sunlight Storm 2
gummim.ex: Fly a Falcon Model from the sample blueprints!
gummim.reward: EX: Shuriken/G Rank S: Cait Sith Model Rank A: Neon Orb/G Rank B: Drill/G Rank C: Parabola/G Rank D: Slash Upgrade Rank E: Infinity/G

gummim.name: Sunlight Storm 3
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship with a cost of 400 or less!
gummim.reward: EX: Strike/G Rank S: Bridge/G Rank A: Cyclone/G Rank B: Typhoon/G Rank C: Orichalcum/G Rank D: Comet/G Rank E: Graviga/G

gummim.name: Assault of the Dreadnought 1
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship set with 2 or more Ultima Gummies!
gummim.reward: EX: Shuriken/G Rank S: Mushroom Model Rank A: Vortex/G Rank B: Big Bridge/G Rank C: Excalibur/G Rank D: Meteor/G Rank E: Cost Converter

gummim.name: Assault of the Dreadnought 2
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship with dimensions of 3 x 3 x 3 or smaller!
gummim.reward: EX: Caterpillar/G Rank S: Fenrir Model Rank A: Square Light/G Rank B: Vortex/G Rank C: Large Shell/G Rank D: Auto-Regen Rank E: Drain/G

gummim.name: Assault of the Dreadnought 3
gummim.ex: Fly a Gummi Ship set with a Drain Gummi!
gummim.reward: EX: Bomb/G Rank S: Big Bridge/G Rank A: Darkness/G Rank B: Angel/G Rank C: Meteor/G Rank D: Graviga/G Rank E: Firaga/G

limits.name: "Valor" Genie
limits.cond: Summon Genie, shift to "Valor" Genie (select Drive? in the command menu), and use Sonic

limits.name: "Wisdom" Genie
limits.cond: Summon Genie, change "Wisdom" Genie (select Drive? in the command menu), and use Strike

limits.name: "Master" Genie
limits.cond: Summon Genie, change "Master" Genie (select Drive? in the command menu), and use Arcana

limits.name: "Final" Genie
limits.cond: Summon Genie, change "Final" Genie (select Drive? in the command menu), and use Infinity
